title: Weighted Values Become Context
learning_goal: Show how attention weights scale and merge value vectors into a single contextual output vector.

manim_objects.content: Four vertical Rectangle bars, height proportional to attention weight. Left-side labels show w=0.xx; right-side labels show v1–v4.
Four Arrow objects from each value bar's right edge to the merge x-position. Stroke width ∝ weight.
Tall context output vector at merge point.

animation_sequence.action: FadeIn all four value stream bars with weight/value labels.
LaggedStart creating weighted arrows from each bar toward merge point.
animation_sequence.manim_hint: self.play(LaggedStart(*[Create(a) for a in arrows], lag_ratio=0.2), run_time=4.0)

animation_sequence.action: Context vector FadeIn and 'context' label Write — building up as if streams converge.
Write the complete attention formula at the bottom.

animation_sequence.manim_hint: End at the declared 13 second scene boundary; the enriched scene wait_after_s handles assembly pacing.

pixverse_support.usage: 4-second cinematic clip of converging coloured streams as base layer. Manim overlaid transparent.
must_preserve: Only abstract motion towards a merge point

music_sfx_cues.purpose: Accent the moment weighted streams converge into the context vector.
Resolve on the full formula reveal — conceptual payoff moment.

acceptance_checks: Arrow stroke widths are visibly proportional to weights (v1 thickest at 0.55).
Context vector appears at the merge point, not mid-arrow.
Full formula includes Q, K, V in correct colours.
PixVerse layer contains no readable text, labels, or formulas.
